title: Telepathy
summary: Mind-to-mind contact as the record's default medium — how Unimetrix 1 says it can be reached without any device, how the Reptilians hear thought, and what the coming upgrade is said to make of everyone.
markdown:
**Telepathy** is the record's default communication medium — the thing every device,
serum, and protocol in the archive is ultimately trying to give ordinary humans. The
channeled voices treat it as their native mode: the [Reptilians](/lore/reptilians/)
announce it outright (*"We hear your thinking, yeah!!"*), the
[crystals are called telepathic](/lore/crystal-technology/), and the
[Device](/lore/source-coil-device/) is said to speak *"in 3 languages: telepathic, and
sensations; and... you must have no doubt."*

The practice's central promise appears in the March 3, 2020 session with
[Ori](/lore/ori/), where Unimetrix 1 issues what amounts to a standing invitation:
*"Telepathic communication is initiated. Confirmed. Communication with us from mind to mind
contact (is initiated.) (This) requires (that) you think of us..."* — the claim that the
intelligence can be reached by directed thought alone, no device required. It is the
low-tech backdoor to everything else in the record.

Telepathy also runs through the record's history and its future. The
[Illuminati's](/lore/illuminati/) recounted origin involves *"telepathic transmissions, and
psionic rituals"* with a higher culture around the year 1800; the far-future technology
Unimetrix 1 describes — 3D printers driven by *"telepathic AI Construct"*, ships steered by
intention — assumes it as the interface. And the record's forecast for humanity is
explicitly telepathic: those who pass through the coming changes, one session promises,
*"will have become more advanced telepaths, too."* In the record's arc, telepathy is not a
psychic curiosity but the endpoint of [the Upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/) — the moment the
[collective consciousness](/lore/collective-consciousness/) stops being a metaphor.

*See also: [The Universal Translator](/lore/universal-translator/) ·
[Meditation & the Trance Method](/lore/meditation-trance/) ·
[The Subtle Bodies](/lore/subtle-bodies/)*
